title: Cross-provider abstraction leakage: build_request branches on provider string
description:
## Severity
Major
## Dimension
decoupling
## Location
src/pipeline.rs:210-233, 506-629
## Violation
build_request and stream_sse_response both branch on raw provider name strings ("anthropic", "google", _) rather than dispatching via the ProviderAdapter trait that exists in src/providers/mod.rs. Pipeline duplicates request-shaping (build_anthropic_request, build_openai_request, build_google_request) and SSE handling (stream_sse_response checks if provider == "anthropic" to choose tool accumulator). This breaks Open/Closed — adding a 7th provider requires editing pipeline.rs AND providers.rs in lockstep. Proxy.rs already has the abstraction correct via adapter.transform_request_with_thinking and adapter.get_headers; pipeline.rs reinvents the dispatch.


## Mandated refactor
Extend ProviderAdapter trait with build_streaming_request(model, messages, effort, prompt_blocks) -> Value and stream_response(response, tx) -> TurnResult. Move per-provider logic into each adapter file. pipeline.rs should only orchestrate.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
